---
id: stremio-play-queue-nzb-and-redirect-to-stream
title: "Stremio play — queue NZB and redirect to stream"
description: "Downloads the NZB from the given Prowlarr URL, adds it to the import queue with high priority, waits for processing, then 302-redirects to the first media stream URL. Used by Stremio after the user selects a stream from handleStremioAddonStream."
sidebar_label: "Stremio play — queue NZB and redirect to stream"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/4. API/altmount-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stremio play — queue NZB and redirect to stream"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/stremio/{key}/play"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads the NZB from the given Prowlarr URL, adds it to the import queue with high priority, waits for processing, then 302-redirects to the first media stream URL. Used by Stremio after the user selects a stream from handleStremioAddonStream.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
